channel.title: Merthyra · The Changelog
channel.description: Every Merthyra update: new features, improvements, and fixes for the personal writing workspace on Mac, iPhone, and iPad.

item.title: The Merthyra website and wiki are live
item.description: Merthyra now has a proper home. The new landing page introduces the whole workspace, the wiki documents every part of it with 17 guides and live search, and The Changelog launches with this very feed.

item.title: The road to the App Store
item.description: Merthyra is in active development for Mac, iPhone, and iPad and headed to the App Store: one workspace for documents, collections, projects, tasks, calendar, research, and files, with a private assistant, local-first iCloud Drive storage, Siri and App Intents, and Apple Intelligence support where available.
